name: radia-mcp
summary: MCP servers for the Radia CAE ecosystem. 0.25.0: cubit_mesh_race_with_human — the signature workflow. User asks AI to mesh a stuck geometry; N AI batches race in parallel WHILE the user keeps working in the live Cubit GUI; first to produce mesh wins (could be human, could be AI); never overwrites the user's in-progress work. 0.24.x base: cubit_mesh_race / build123d_try_race / freecad_exec_safely.
author: Kengo Sugahara
